meta.title: the counter at 2:14 AM · night 12
meta.for: Estuary 3 · Act 1 · Night 12 variant of the Kwik Stop hum
meta.notes: Same 16-bar shape as estuary_3_kwik_stop_hum but the fluorescent above aisle 3 does NOT flicker on night 12 (per the seasonal_texture_notes in act1_kwik_stop.json). Musically: the wobble in the fluorescent_hum voice is removed, and a slightly warmer slowstick_pad sigh at bar 15 replaces the original's cooler one. The room is holding its breath before the 2 AM customer stands up.
